expression: /*SeaDex Best*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : seadex(streams, 'best')
/*SeaDex Alt*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams, 'best'), seadex(streams))
/*Anime BD T1*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Anime BD T1'))
/*Anime BD T2*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Anime BD T2'))
/*Anime BD T3*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Anime BD T3'))
/*Anime BD T4*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Anime BD T4'))

/*Anime Remux T1*/ (queryType!='anime.movie') ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), releaseGroup(quality(streams, 'Bluray REMUX'), '3L','BiZKiT','BLURANiUM','BMF','CiNEPHiLES','FraMeSToR','PiRAMiDHEAD','PmP','WiLDCAT','ZQ'))

/*v2*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), negate(regexMatched(streams, 'v3', 'v4', 'Repack2', 'Repack3'), regexMatched(streams, 'v2', 'Repack/Proper')))
/*v3*/ (not isAnime) ? [] : negate(seadex(streams), negate(regexMatched(streams, 'v4', 'Repack3'), regexMatched(streams, 'v3', 'Repack2')))

/*Anime Raws*/ isAnime ? negate(seadex(streams), regexMatched(streams, 'Anime Raws')) : []
